2026-04-23T05:29:52.7975073Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-23T05:29:52.7975888Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-23T05:29:52.7976327Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-23T05:29:52.7976691Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-23T05:29:52.7977001Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-23T05:29:52.7977233Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-23T05:29:52.7977388Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-23T05:29:52.7977562Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-23T05:29:52.7977725Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-23T05:29:52.7977951Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-23T05:29:52.7978150Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-23T05:29:52.7978439Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-23T05:29:52.7978696Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

Should explain what was analyzed and the outcome (e.g., 'Code review complete - no issues found', 'Analysis complete - all tests passing').","type":"string"},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"}},"required":["message"],"type":"object"},"name":"noop"},{"description":"Report that data or information needed to complete the task is not available. Use this when you cannot accomplish what was requested because required data, context, or information is missing.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"alternatives":{"description":"Any workarounds, manual steps, or alternative approaches the user could take (max 256 characters).","type":"string"},"context":{"description":"Additional context about the missing data or where it should come from (max 256 characters).","type":"string"},"data_type":{"description":"Type or description of the missing data or information (max 128 characters). Be specific about what data is needed.","type":"string"},"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"reason":{"description":"Explanation of why this data is needed to complete the task (max 256 characters).","type":"string"},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"}},"required":[],"type":"object"},"name":"missing_data"},{"description":"Signal that the task could not be completed due to an infrastructure or tool failure (e.g., MCP server crash, missing authentication, inaccessible repository). Use this when required tools or data are unavailable and the task cannot be meaningfully performed. This is distinct from noop (no action needed) — it indicates an active failure that prevented the task from running. The workflow framework will treat this as a failure signal even when the agent exits successfully.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"details":{"description":"Optional extended details or diagnostic context about the failure (max 65000 characters).","type":"string"},"reason":{"description":"A concise explanation of why the task could not be completed (max 1024 characters). This is the first stable release and introduced the package to the repository including:\\n- `ConfidentialLedgerResource` with a new `FilesExportAsync` long-running operation\\n- New model properties on `ConfidentialLedgerProperties`: `EnclavePlatform`, `ApplicationType`, `ScittConfiguration`, `HostLevel`, `MaxBodySizeInMb`, `SubjectName`, `NodeCount`, `WriteLBAddressPrefix`, `WorkerThreads`\\n- New enums: `ConfidentialLedgerEnclavePlatform`, `ConfidentialLedgerApplicationType`\\n\\nThe README was created from a boilerplate template with no service-specific content.\\n\\n## Gaps Found\\n\\n- **No service-specific examples**: The \\u0026#34;Examples\\u0026#34; section only links to the generic management samples URL (`(aka.ms/redacted) there are no inline code examples or snippet placeholders (`\\\\`\\\\`\\\\`C# Snippet:...\\\\`\\\\`\\\\``)\\n- **No snippet test file**: `tests/Scenario/Samples/` does not exist; the generated samples in `tests/Generated/Samples/` are not wired to the README via `#region Snippet:` tags, so `Update-Snippets.ps1` produces no output\\n- **`FilesExportAsync` not documented**: The new LRO operation for exporting ledger files is not mentioned anywhere in the README\\n- **New model properties not documented**: `EnclavePlatform`, `ApplicationType`, `ScittConfiguration`, and the CCF tuning properties (`HostLevel`, `MaxBodySizeInMb`, `NodeCount`, etc.) added in 1.1.0 are not described\\n- **\\u0026#34;Key concepts\\u0026#34; section is generic**: Does not mention `ConfidentialLedgerResource`, `ConfidentialLedgerCollection`, `ConfidentialLedgerData`, or the supported operations (Get, Create, Update, Delete, FilesExport)\\n\\n\\n\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Modify files\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/confidentialledger/Azure.ResourceManager.ConfidentialLedger/README.md` — Edit\\n\\nReplace the placeholder sections with service-specific content:\\n\\n1. **Key concepts** section — replace the generic link with a description of the main types:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Key concepts\\n\\n- **`ConfidentialLedgerResource`** — Represents a provisioned Confidential Ledger instance. Supports get, update, delete, and the `FilesExportAsync` long-running operation.\\n- **`ConfidentialLedgerCollection`** — Scoped to a resource group; supports listing, creating, and checking for the existence of ledgers. Accessible via `ResourceGroupResource.GetConfidentialLedgers()`.\\n- **`ConfidentialLedgerData`** — Data bag for a ledger, including `Properties` (of type `ConfidentialLedgerProperties`), tags, and location.\\n- **`ConfidentialLedgerProperties`** — Configures ledger type (`ConfidentialLedgerType`), SKU (`ConfidentialLedgerSku`), AAD and certificate-based security principals, running state, enclave platform, application type, and SCITT configuration.\\n```\\n\\n2. **Examples** section — replace the generic link with snippet placeholders:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Examples\\n\\n### Create a Confidential Ledger\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Get a Confidential Ledger\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Export Ledger Files\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Delete a Confidential Ledger\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\nCode samples for using the management library for .NET can also be found in the following locations:\\n- [.NET Management Library Code Samples]((aka.ms/redacted)\\n```\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\nCreate a new test file at:\\n`sdk/confidentialledger/Azure.ResourceManager.ConfidentialLedger/tests/Scenario/Samples/Sample_ConfidentialLedger.cs`\\n\\nUse the following as a template (adapt resource IDs and properties as needed):\\n\\n```csharp\\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. section is generic**: Does not mention `ConfidentialLedgerResource`, `ConfidentialLedgerCollection`, `ConfidentialLedgerData`, or the supported operations (Get, Create, Update, Delete, FilesExport)\\n\\n\\n\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Modify files\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/confidentialledger/Azure.ResourceManager.ConfidentialLedger/README.md` — Edit\\n\\nReplace the placeholder sections with service-specific content:\\n\\n1. **Key concepts** section — replace the generic link with a description of the main types:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Key concepts\\n\\n- **`ConfidentialLedgerResource`** — Represents a provisioned Confidential Ledger instance. Supports get, update, delete, and the `FilesExportAsync` long-running operation.\\n- **`ConfidentialLedgerCollection`** — Scoped to a resource group; supports listing, creating, and checking for the existence of ledgers. Accessible via `ResourceGroupResource.GetConfidentialLedgers()`.\\n- **`ConfidentialLedgerData`** — Data bag for a ledger, including `Properties` (of type `ConfidentialLedgerProperties`), tags, and location.\\n- **`ConfidentialLedgerProperties`** — Configures ledger type (`ConfidentialLedgerType`), SKU (`ConfidentialLedgerSku`), AAD and certificate-based security principals, running state, enclave platform, application type, and SCITT configuration.\\n```\\n\\n2. **Examples** section — replace the generic link with snippet placeholders:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Examples\\n\\n### Create a Confidential Ledger\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Get a Confidential Ledger\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Export Ledger Files\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Delete a Confidential Ledger\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\nCode samples for using the management library for .NET can also be found in the following locations:\\n- [.NET Management Library Code Samples]((aka.ms/redacted)\\n```\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\nCreate a new test file at:\\n`sdk/confidentialledger/Azure.ResourceManager.ConfidentialLedger/tests/Scenario/Samples/Sample_ConfidentialLedger.cs`\\n\\nUse the following as a template (adapt resource IDs and properties as needed):\\n\\n```csharp\\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\\n\\nusing System;\\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\\nusing Azure.Core;\\nusing Azure.Identity;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.ConfidentialLedger;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.ConfidentialLedger.Models;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Resources;\\nusing NUnit.Framework;\\n\\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.ConfidentialLedger.Samples\\n{\\n    public class Sample_ConfidentialLedger\\n    {\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only validating compilation of examples\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task CreateOrUpdate_Sample()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:ConfidentialLedger_CreateOrUpdate\\n            TokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\\n\\n            string subscriptionId = \\u0026#34;0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001\\u0026#34;;\\n            string resourceGroupName = \\u0026#34;DummyResourceGroupName\\u0026#34;;\\n            string ledgerName = \\u0026#34;DummyLedgerName\\u0026#34;;\\n\\n            ResourceIdentifier resourceGroupId = ResourceGroupResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(subscriptionId, resourceGroupName);\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = client.GetResourceGroupResource(resourceGroupId);\\n\\n            ConfidentialLedgerCollection ledgers = resourceGroup.GetConfidentialLedgers();\\n\\n            ConfidentialLedgerData data = new ConfidentialLedgerData(AzureLocation.EastUS)\\n            {\\n                Properties = new ConfidentialLedgerProperties\\n                {\\n                    LedgerType = ConfidentialLedgerType.Public,\\n                    LedgerSku = ConfidentialLedgerSku.Standard,\\n                },\\n            };\\n\\n            ArmOperation lro = await ledgers.CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, ledgerName, data);\\n            ConfidentialLedgerResource ledger = lro.Value;\\n\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Succeeded on id: {ledger.Data.Id}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only validating compilation of examples\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task Get_Sample()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:ConfidentialLedger_Get\\n            TokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\\n\\n            string subscriptionId = \\u0026#34;DummyLedgerName\\u0026#34;;\\n\\n            ResourceIdentifier ledgerId = ConfidentialLedgerResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(subscriptionId, resourceGroupName, ledgerName);\\n            ConfidentialLedgerResource ledger = client.GetConfidentialLedgerResource(ledgerId);\\n\\n            ConfidentialLedgerResource result = await ledger.GetAsync();\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Ledger URI: {result.Data.Properties?.LedgerUri}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only validating compilation of examples\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task FilesExport_Sample()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:ConfidentialLedger_FilesExport\\n            TokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\\n\\n            string subscriptionId = \\u0026#34;0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001\\u0026#34;;\\n            string resourceGroupName = \\u0026#34;DummyResourceGroupName\\u0026#34;;\\n            string ledgerName = \\u0026#34;DummyLedgerName\\u0026#34;;\\n\\n            ResourceIdentifier ledgerId = ConfidentialLedgerResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(subscriptionId, resourceGroupName, ledgerName);\\n            ConfidentialLedgerResource ledger = client.GetConfidentialLedgerResource(ledgerId);\\n\\n            ConfidentialLedgerFilesExportContent content = new ConfidentialLedgerFilesExportContent\\n            {\\n                DestinationStorageAccountName = \\u0026#34;destStorageAccount\\u0026#34;,\\n                DestinationStorageContainerName = \\u0026#34;destContainer\\u0026#34;,\\n            };\\n\\n            ArmOperation lro = await ledger.FilesExportAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, content);\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Export succeeded: {lro.Value.Message}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only validating compilation of examples\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task Delete_Sample()\\n        {\\n subscriptionId = \\u0026#34;0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001\\u0026#34;;\\n            string resourceGroupName = \\u0026#34;DummyResourceGroupName\\u0026#34;;\\n            string ledgerName = \\u0026#34;DummyLedgerName\\u0026#34;;\\n\\n            ResourceIdentifier ledgerId = ConfidentialLedgerResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(subscriptionId, resourceGroupName, ledgerName);\\n            ConfidentialLedgerResource ledger = client.GetConfidentialLedgerResource(ledgerId);\\n\\n            await ledger.DeleteAsync(WaitUntil.Completed);\\n            Console.WriteLine(\\u0026#34;Succeeded\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\nFor each snippet:\\n- **`ConfidentialLedger_CreateOrUpdate`** → README \\u0026#34;Create The error mentions a missing resource provider for a recent API version, but the resources were created via an ARM template using `2020-07-01`, while the SDK doesn't expose which version it uses.\\n\\n### Expected behavior\\n\\nThe method call to succeed.\\n\\n### Actual behavior\\n\\nWhen deleting PIPs (same for NSGs and NICs) we get the following error message:\\n```\\nNo registered resource provider found for location 'westeurope' and API version '2025-03-01' for type 'publicIPAddresses'. newzealandnorth, indonesiacentral, austriaeast, chilecentral, malaysiawest'.\\n```\\n\\n### Reproduction Steps\\n\\n```\\nvar resourceGroupName = \\\"abc\\\";\\nvar resourcesPrefix = \\\"abc\\\";\\n\\nvar subscriptionId = \\\"abc\\\";\\nvar tenantId = \\\"abc\\\";\\nvar clientId = \\\"abc\\\";\\nvar clientSecret = \\\"abc\\\";\\n\\nvar credentials = new ClientSecretCredential(\\n    tenantId,\\n    clientId,\\n    clientSecret);\\nvar armClient = new ArmClient(credentials);\\n\\nstring resourceGroupId = $\\\"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}\\\";\\nvar rg = armClient.GetResourceGroupResource(ResourceIdentifier.Parse(resourceGroupId))?.Get()?.Value;\\nvar resources = rg?.GetGenericResources($\\\"substringof(\\\\'{resourcesPrefix}\\\\', name)\\\", null, 20).ToList();\\n\\nforeach (var resource in resources)\\n{\\n    try\\n    {\\n        await resource.DeleteAsync(WaitUntil.Started);\\n        Console.WriteLine($\\\"Deleting resource: {resource.Id}\\\");\\n    }\\n    catch (Exception ex)\\n    {\\n        Console.WriteLine($\\\"Error
